title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Double Rewards for Madrazo Hits
content: Local mogul Martin Madrazo needs help silencing his critics and rivals — Bail Office owners can lend a hand and earn 2X GTA$ and RP on Madrazo Hits, plus extra for using Madrazo’s weapon of choice (and stacking to 4X for GTA+ Members).
